reasoning: Order #000000555 is marked Complete with the item shipped and fully paid ($91.69) via Check/Money Order. The customer request provides no reason beyond 'Requesting a refund' and there is no indication of a return or issue with the order. Per standard refund handling, shipped and completed orders require a valid reason and typically a return/RMA before issuing a credit memo. Escalating to request additional details (reason for refund and return confirmation) before proceeding.
